title: goodenia tenuiloba
intro: Goodenia tenuiloba, also known as native violet, is a flowering plant native to Australia that belongs to the Goodeniaceae family. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Goodenia tenuiloba include the potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Goodenia tenuiloba is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
